rationale: The post-launch metrics indicate a decline in key performance indicators such as conversion rate, retention rates, and payment success rate. Additionally, there is a significant increase in error rate, API latency, and support tickets. These trends suggest that the product is not performing as expected and requires immediate attention. User sentiment is 0.075 with PR risk level: medium. 0 of 5 PM success criteria met. Finance estimates $10,725/day revenue at risk.
confidence_explanation: Low confidence (0.38) in Pause — situation is critical. Health score at 0.2. Immediate action recommended. Confidence in recovery would increase with a confirmed bug fix and stable rollback metrics.

risk_register.mitigation: Conduct thorough testing and quality assurance before re-launching the product.
Develop a comprehensive user support plan and communicate clearly with users about the product's status and any issues.

risk_register.risk: Over-reliance on a single metric or success criterion
risk_register.mitigation: Use a balanced set of metrics and success criteria to evaluate the product's performance.

risk_register.risk: Failure to address underlying technical issues
risk_register.mitigation: Conduct a thorough technical review and address any underlying issues before re-launching the product.

action_plan.action: Halt rollout at current traffic — do not expand
Isolate payment service — roll back to stable version
Draft and schedule customer-facing status update
Set up 30-min war room sync for re-evaluation

communication_plan.internal: The recent product launch has received mixed feedback from users, with concerns around billing and performance issues. We need to prioritize resolving these technical issues to improve user experience and prevent further negative reviews.
communication_plan.external: Thank you for your feedback on our recent update. We apologize for any inconvenience caused by billing and performance issues. Our team is working hard to resolve these problems and improve your overall experience. We appreciate your patience and look forward to providing a better service soon.
